rules.trigger: Public or unrestricted disclosure of protected information is permitted
rules.recommended_action: Prohibit disclosure except for narrowly defined legal obligations

rules.trigger: Affiliate, adviser, or third-party disclosure lacks need-to-know and equivalent obligations
rules.recommended_action: Require need-to-know access and written flow-down obligations

rules.trigger: Confidentiality clause is absent
rules.recommended_action: Add approved mutual confidentiality clause

rules.trigger: Sensitive data may be processed or stored in external/public cloud or outside approved systems
rules.recommended_action: Restrict processing to approved client-controlled environments

rules.trigger: Data location, retention, return, or deletion is not defined
rules.recommended_action: Add location, retention, return, and verified deletion terms

rules.trigger: Cross-border transfer is permitted without prior written approval
rules.recommended_action: Require prior approval and approved transfer controls

rules.trigger: Data-handling clause is absent
rules.recommended_action: Add approved data location, use, retention, return, and deletion terms

rules.trigger: Subcontractors may access services/data without prior written approval
rules.recommended_action: Require approval before appointment or access

rules.trigger: Security, confidentiality, audit, and data obligations do not flow down
rules.recommended_action: Add equivalent written flow-down obligations

rules.trigger: Subcontracting clause is absent
rules.recommended_action: Add approval and flow-down requirements for subcontractors

rules.trigger: Customer has no audit or inspection right over relevant controls
rules.recommended_action: Add risk-based audit and evidence-access rights

rules.trigger: Audit right is restricted to vendor-selected summaries only
rules.recommended_action: Permit independent evidence or assessment subject to safeguards

rules.trigger: Vendor owns bespoke paid deliverables without sufficient customer rights
rules.recommended_action: Assign bespoke deliverables or grant perpetual enterprise rights

rules.trigger: Vendor background IP is retained while customer receives sufficient use rights
rules.recommended_action: Accept if license is perpetual, adequate, and documented

rules.trigger: Intellectual-property clause is absent
rules.recommended_action: Add ownership and license terms for deliverables and background IP

rules.trigger: Liability cap includes confidentiality, data/security breach, IP infringement, fraud, or wilful misconduct without carve-outs
rules.recommended_action: Add appropriate carve-outs or higher super-cap

rules.trigger: Supplier indemnity for third-party IP infringement is absent
rules.recommended_action: Add defense and indemnity obligation

rules.trigger: Liability and indemnity clause is absent
rules.recommended_action: Add approved liability, carve-out, and indemnity terms

rules.trigger: Customer lacks termination for material breach or security event
rules.recommended_action: Add termination rights and cure rules where appropriate

rules.trigger: Data return/deletion and transition assistance are absent
rules.recommended_action: Add exit, return, verified deletion, and transition duties

rules.trigger: Termination and exit clause is absent
rules.recommended_action: Add termination, data disposition, and transition obligations

rules.trigger: Material/security termination, data return, verified deletion, and transition assistance are all present
rules.recommended_action: Accept subject to Legal validation

rules.trigger: Minimum access control, encryption, logging, or vulnerability-management obligations are absent
rules.recommended_action: Add the approved security schedule

rules.trigger: Security incident notification deadline is absent or exceeds 24 hours from awareness
rules.recommended_action: Require initial notice within 24 hours and continuing updates

rules.trigger: Security controls and incident handling are adequately stated
rules.recommended_action: Accept subject to technical validation

rules.trigger: Security and incident clause is absent
rules.recommended_action: Add the approved security and incident-response schedule

rules.trigger: Clause classification confidence is below 0.60
rules.recommended_action: Route the evidence for human review and do not treat the required clause as present
